LanguageData.FCP_Animal_California_Grizzly.descriptio: 这是一只来自加利福尼亚山区的大型双头熊，它是 NCR 及其军队的思想和政治象征。这种巨大的野兽应该受到尊重和荣誉对待。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_California_Grizzly.label: 加州灰熊队
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_NCR_Guard_Dog.description: Some dogs have been domesticated, even charged with guarding its owner and all thier property this animal will do so to the best of its ability. While others have been specially bred to be a true battle buddy for the NCR. Tasked with defending troops from harm in the form of 危险 chems, explosives and enemy combatants themselves.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_NCR_Guard_Dog.label: NCR看门狗
